name: beezee
description: Launch and manage Claude Code and Codex sessions from any device

scripts.build:binary: npm run embed && bun build --compile server.js --outfile beezee
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:binary
scripts.build:release: npm run build:frontend && npm run embed && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 server.js --outfile beezee-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 server.js --outfile beezee-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 server.js --outfile beezee-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 server.js --outfile beezee-darwin-x64 && node scripts/bundle-windows.js
